title: Molt
pitch: Damage crystallizes onto your body as armor — molt to bank your wounds as permanent power.
howto: Survive the arena while enemy hits grow typed crystal plates on your back: armor up, speed down. Molt to shed the shell in a nova and bank every plate as a permanent stat (Ember=damage, Stone=HP, Toxin=regen). Die with plates on and they're lost — you grind builds by choosing WHAT hits you.
controls: Drag anywhere to move. Tap the MOLT button to shed. Desktop: WASD/arrows + Space.
